summary: Release governance and production safety checks for RPC permissions, JWT keys, deployment gates, and timesheet withdraw smoke testing.

notes: No database schema migration is included in this release.
Function exposure remains at 44 public schema functions, 0 PostgreSQL PUBLIC execute grants, 3 anon executable functions, and 16 authenticated executable functions.
Documented the function permission inventory and frontend RPC allowlist.
Added SQL assertions for function grants.
Added a transactional smoke test for submitted timesheet withdraw behavior.
Fixed the Aliyun deploy script to use the configured PostgreSQL user when applying GoTrue compatibility SQL.

deployment.cloud: Build frontend with VITE_APP_VERSION=V0.16.45 and rebuild approval-app with APP_IMAGE_TAG=V0.16.45.
notes: Run deploy/scripts/pre-deploy-check.sh before and after deploy as the production gate.

verification: Run npm --prefix frontend run build with VITE_APP_VERSION=V0.16.45.
Run scripts/smoke-timesheet-withdraw.sql against production in rollback mode.
